set.body: Throughout wrappers.R, ~40 sites pre-allocate resident keys then use manual try-drop after tryCatch instead of on.exit. Any error between the tryCatch return and the manual drop permanently leaks device memory. Fix: convert all such sites to on.exit(amatrix_release_resident_key(key), add = TRUE) right after allocation. Found by round 2 hunt amatrix-5y1, hunter 02. See .bug-hunt-r2/02-antipattern-greps.md for the full site list.
set.title: GPU key leaks: ~40 alloc sites in wrappers.R use manual try-drop instead of on.exit
